evidence.responseSummary: {"code":400,"data":null,"message":"public produceTaskCreated 已禁用：当前恢复版本不会创建制造指令单，请使用 /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/produceTaskCreated2 或恢复经产品确认的落库实现。"}
evidence.verificationSql:
SELECT count(*)::text
FROM public.wom_produce_tasks
WHERE coalesce(table_no::text, '') LIKE '%ADP_E2E_20260622075328_PUBLIC_PRODUCE_NOOP%'
   OR coalesce(produce_batch_num::text, '') LIKE '%ADP_E2E_20260622075328_PUBLIC_PRODUCE_NOOP%'
   OR coalesce(day_plan_ids::text, '') LIKE '%ADP_E2E_20260622075328_PUBLIC_PRODUCE_NOOP%';
evidence.databaseResult: marker count remained 0 before and 0 after; endpoint returned explicit disabled response code=400
evidence.latestProbeConclusion: Endpoint no longer returns false success; HTTP 200, code=400, message=public produceTaskCreated 已禁用：当前恢复版本不会创建制造指令单，请使用 /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/produceTaskCreated2 或恢复经产品确认的落库实现。. Update backlog classification after product review.

sourceTrace.finding: The recovered source has the intended creation body commented out and would return success without persistence; the test runtime now patches the public endpoint to return an explicit disabled response pending product decision.

backlog.issue: public produceTaskCreated is explicitly disabled in the test runtime because the recovered implementation would otherwise return success without inserting or updating wom_produce_tasks
backlog.nextAction: Confirm whether the public endpoint is still a product contract. If yes, restore or replace creatProTask and rerun marker API/browser/PostgreSQL acceptance. If no, keep/document the disabled response and remove it from supported create API docs.
